raw:
I'll verify the work against the task deliverables. Let me start by examining the repo structure and key files.
Let me check the .ts constraint and read the key deliverable files.
CHARTER kernel looks complete and current. No .ts files changed. Let me verify the sub-pages, crew prompts, install.sh, README, and architecture.
Both sub-pages are thorough and match the described code behavior. Let me verify them against the actual .ts code, and check crew prompts + install.sh + README + architecture.
All looking good. Crew prompts have concise charter-reading instructions, install.sh idempotent symlink added and echoed, README updated. Let me verify against actual code (models.json, gates.ts, done.ts) and check architecture.md + confirm deletions + run the test suite.
All deliverables present. PHASE2-SPEC references in markdown only remain in the .pi/plans/ (the task's own plan files, not real docs — acceptable). Let me confirm DASHBOARD-SPEC was fixed and verify the gates.ts/done.ts code matches the docs claims, then run the test suite.
The gate-pipeline.md doc matches gates.ts exactly (kinds, stages, gate shape, paths, malformed→no gates, verify fallback). The DASHBOARD-SPEC PHASE2 dangling ref was fixed. Now run the full test suite to confirm no regression.
The done.ts code confirms the definition-of-done.md doc is accurate: six checks (plan, per-round, tester, pre-ship, reviewer, founder), n/a handling, inconclusive reviewer blocks, blockers array. Full test suite passes including gate_flow.

All deliverables verified accurate against code. Summary:

- **CHARTER.md kernel**: current Roles table (all 8 roles, correct model IDs), full loop with Gate relays + DoD rationale, Safety (quota + guard), and the "## Docs structure" section with the verbatim split rule ("graduate it to docs/charter/<concept>.md") + links to both sub-pages. ✓
- **gate-pipeline.md & definition-of-done.md**: created, content matches gates.ts/done.ts exactly (gate shape, kinds/stages, verify fallback, six checks, blocking semantics, three recording surfaces). ✓
- **install.sh**: idempotent `link` charter symlink to `$AGENT_DIR/foreman/charter`, echoed in summary. ✓
- **planner.md / reviewer.md**: concise best-effort charter-read instruction added; frontmatter (model/tools) unchanged; reviewer cites charter rule on violation, planner plans within rules. ✓
- **architecture.md**: updated to current — load model, install symlinks (incl. charter), domain list (foreman/subagent/AskUserQuestion/grok/codex/antigravity), live pipeline; no "askuser (planned)" / Phase-2 framing; links CHARTER. ✓
- **Deletions**: PHASE2-SPEC.md and foreman-impact-probe.md gone; DASHBOARD-SPEC dangling ref fixed. ✓
- **README**: layout tree updated to CHARTER + charter/, full crew, no PHASE2-SPEC. ✓
- **Constraints**: zero .ts changes (`git diff --name-only '*.ts'` empty); full suite passes incl. gate_flow. ✓

Remaining PHASE2-SPEC mentions are only inside `.pi/plans/*/plan.md` (the task's own planning artifacts, not the doc tree) — not a violation.

VERDICT: PASS

```dev-json
{"verdict":"pass","summary":"All deliverables met: CHARTER restructured into accurate current kernel + two split sub-pages with verbatim split rule; gate-pipeline.md and definition-of-done.md match gates.ts/done.ts exactly; install.sh adds idempotent charter symlink echoed in summary; planner.md/reviewer.md gain concise best-effort charter-read instructions with frontmatter unchanged; architecture.md and README updated to current specifics; PHASE2-SPEC.md and foreman-impact-probe.md deleted with refs fixed. Zero .ts edits and full test suite passes.","confidence":"high"}
```
